reauth_confirm.title: Update OpenTelemetry authentication
reauth_confirm.description: Update the OTLP connection settings to restore trace export.

data_description.endpoint: URL of the OTLP receiver (e.g. http://localhost:4317 for gRPC, http://localhost:4318/v1/traces for HTTP)
data_description.protocol: Transport protocol to use for sending traces
data_description.auth_header: Optional Bearer token or API key for authentication

reconfigure.title: Update OpenTelemetry export settings
reconfigure.description: Update the OTLP connection settings used for trace export.

data_description.endpoint: URL of the OTLP receiver (e.g. http://localhost:4317 for gRPC, http://localhost:4318/v1/traces for HTTP)
data_description.protocol: Transport protocol to use for sending traces
data_description.auth_header: Optional Bearer token or API key for authentication

user.title: Configure OpenTelemetry trace export
user.description: Set up trace export to Grafana Tempo or another OTLP-compatible backend.

data_description.endpoint: URL of the OTLP receiver (e.g. http://localhost:4317 for gRPC, http://localhost:4318/v1/traces for HTTP)
data_description.protocol: Transport protocol to use for sending traces
data_description.auth_header: Optional Bearer token or API key for authentication
